items.title: Mentioned in here: Any team that landed top-5 in the 2026 draft (Bulls!) should be hoping they DON'T get a top-5 pick in 2027. Why? Because the new rules ban teams from getting three consecutive top-5 picks.
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt:
Mentioned in here: Any team that landed top-5 in the 2026 draft (Bulls!) should be hoping they DON'T get a top-5 pick in 2027. Why? Because the new rules ban teams from getting three consecutive top-5 picks.

Who cares about the 2027 draft. The real star-power is in 2028.

With the Las Vegas Aces tendering an offer sheet to rookie Justine Pissott on Monday, the Fever have until 5 p.m. ET to match. To do so, they must first open a roster spot.

Tuesday is also the deadline to waive a player before contracts become fully guaranteed.

items.title: Dean Wade says he’s excited to play with “maybe the fastest person I’ve ever tried to guard,” Tyrese Maxey.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Dean Wade says he’s excited to play with “maybe the fastest person I’ve ever tried to guard,” Tyrese Maxey. 

“I think his biggest growth was getting off the ball and making people better… He’s always going to be able to go out and get his points.”
